'''Garch''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who served on the [[Marauder (Warrior-class)|''Marauder'']] and later was reassigned to the ''[[Glorious]]''.

During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], he was assigned to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt|Pakkpekatt's]] command cruiser.
